config.script:
import json
	import time
	# refresh device list
	self.props.style.cursor = "progress"
	self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#00000060"
	self.props.enabled = False
	
	try:
	
	
		
		devList = device.get.listDevices(self.session.custom.tenantID)
		
		
		# Then create an empty list, this will house our data.
		data = []
		headers = ['devEUI', 'Name', 'SensorType', 'ImageUploaded', 'Latitude', 'Longitude', 'Equipment Tag', "Sensor Tag", 'Description', 'Custom Attributes' ]	 
		for d in devList:
			# Then add each row to the list. Note that each row is also a list object.
			
			devEUI = d['devEUI']
			name = d['deviceName']
			checkedIn = False
			
			lat = d['latitude']
			lon = d['longitude']
			desc = d['description']
			sensorType = d['deviceType']
			eTag = ""
			sTag = ""
			metaData = ""
			image = ""
			tagPath = d['fullTagPath']
			try:
				metaData = device.get.getMetaData(devEUI)
				if len(metaData.keys()) > 0:
					if 'Equipment Tag' in metaData:
					
						eTag = metaData['Equipment Tag']
					if "Sensor Tag" in metaData:
						sTag = metaData["Sensor Tag"]
			except Exception as e:
				system.perspective.print("Error getting metaadata" + str(e))	
					
			try:
				image = system.tag.readBlocking([tagPath + '/metaData/image'])[0].value
				if image != None and len(image) != 2:
					image = "Uploaded"
				else:
					image = "Not uploaded"
			except Exception as e:
				image = "Error loading image: " + str(e)
				system.perspective.print("image error")	
		
#			
#			if vals[3] == "Activated":
#				checkedIn = True
#			
	
			values = [devEUI, name, sensorType,  image, lat, lon, eTag, sTag, desc, str(metaData) ]
			data.append(values)
			
		csv = system.dataset.toDataSet(headers, data) 		 
	
		data = system.dataset.toExcel(True, [csv])
		now = system.date.now()
		formattedDate = system.date.format(now,"MM-dd-yyyhmms")
		fileName = formattedDate + "_SiteSyncDevices.xlsx"
		system.perspective.download(fileName,data)					
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print(str(e))
	
	self.props.style.cursor = "pointer"
	self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#00000020"

import json
	import time
	# refresh device list
	self.props.style.cursor = "progress"
	self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#00000060"
	columns = []
	true = True
	false = False
	
	try:
		
		self.view.custom.filterValue = None
		self.view.custom.filterApplied = False
		system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshData", {})

	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print(e)
	
	
	time.sleep(1)
	self.props.style.cursor = "pointer"
	self.props.style.backgroundColor = "#00000020"
